preReview.title: Houston Dynamo v Austin FC: Estevez expecting more as visitors gear up for clash of Texans
preReview.description: After edging out a win over LA Galaxy, Austin FC now take on Houston Dynamo in an all-Texas clash on Saturday.

QAData.answer: Houston Dynamo FC won 2–0 over Austin FC on Sun, 27 Apr 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
